method.conditions: Purchased suspended in deionized water (1000 μg/mL, pH 7.0)

structural.morphology: well dispersed with a single layer of oxidized graphene
structural.crystallinity: Rich defects with D and G bands

applications.performance: Genotoxic at 100 μg/mL (noncytotoxic dose) with 2898 differentially expressed genes
applications.comparative_advantage: Could contribute to the cellular recovery

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Incomplete Structure: The entire section 'carbon_dots -> synthesis -> method -> catalysts' was incorrectly omitted. The JSON is missing a mandatory structural block. | Contextual Error: The correct text for carbon_dots -> synthesis -> method -> type was 'Commercial Source', but the model wrongly extracted 'Aqueous precursor solution sealed in a Teflon-lined stainless-steel autoclave and heated at 180 °C for 6 h, followed by natural cooling to room temperature'.
